name: gemini-writing-copilot
description: Use Antigravity/Gemini as a local writing specialist from Codex skills and bundled scripts.

interface.shortDescription: Call Antigravity/Gemini only for explicit writing tasks.
interface.longDescription: Gemini Writing Copilot routes explicit writing work through Google Antigravity's local agy CLI by default, with the older Gemini Web cookie client kept as a fallback. It uses Gemini-authored composition guidance, writing-specific tasks, style profiles, voice preservation modes, output contracts, and rewrite controls for prose work while leaving coding, debugging, and architectural judgment to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Gemini to polish this text.
Draft release notes from this change summary.
Translate this paragraph into Korean with a calm professional tone.
